script:
set +e
echo '=== current master credential ownership (RECOVERY-CRITICAL) ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== restore master to azureuser:azureuser ==='
chown azureuser:azureuser /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
chmod 600 /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== test mskai (azureuser) still works ==='
sudo -u azureuser bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 25 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -8
echo '=== which per-user .credentials.json files are SYMLINKS vs real ==='
for u in afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily gabriel heather jesusr jose kaye lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid; do
  f=/home/$u/.claude/.credentials.json
  if [ -L "$f" ]; then echo "$u SYMLINK -> $(readlink "$f")"; elif [ -f "$f" ]; then echo "$u realfile $(stat -c '%U:%G' "$f")"; else echo "$u MISSING"; fi
done
echo '===END==='
